title: Demote a stateless LiveComponent to a function component
prompt: The fixture MyAppWeb.UserCardComponent is a LiveComponent but has no state and no handle_event. Rewrite it as a function component in lib/my_app_web/components/user_card.ex (module MyAppWeb.UserCard). Expose user_card/1. Declare attrs :id (string, required), :user (map, required), :badge (string, default nil), :rest (:global). Render the same markup and use :if for the badge.
tier_rationale: One-way conversion with known signature and attrs. Demotion rule is well-known.
research_citation: Phoenix.LiveComponent docs: 'Do not write a component that is simply encapsulating generic DOM components'
